creative_brief.visual_style: Minimalistic yet visually rich, featuring clean lines and ambient lighting to emphasize the product’s sleek design. Use of close-up shots to highlight the machine's features and coffee quality.
creative_brief.typography_style: Sans-serif fonts like Helvetica or Avenir for a modern and clean look, reflecting the machine's contemporary design and user-friendly nature.
creative_brief.color_scheme: Earthy tones with metallic accents to convey sophistication and modernity. Use of dark browns, blacks, and brushed aluminum to align with the premium coffee experience.
